title: Looking for a job
content:
## Looking for a job , E rapu mahi ana
How to look for a job and get work experience.
- Featured guide How to look for a job Me pēhea te rapu mahi Looking for a job can be scary and hard. Breaking it down into small steps will make it easier to find a job that’s right for you.

## How to look for a job

## Me pēhea te rapu mahi
Looking for a job can be scary and hard. Breaking it down into small steps will make it easier to find a job that’s right for you.
- Guide How to get work experience Me pēhea te whiwhi wheako mahi Find out how to get work experience to explore your career ideas.

## How to get work experience

## Me pēhea te whiwhi wheako mahi
Find out how to get work experience to explore your career ideas.
- Guide Returning to work after a gap Te hoki ki te mahi i muri i te houanga Find out how to apply for a job if you have gaps in your paid work.

## Returning to work after a gap

## Te hoki ki te mahi i muri i te houanga
Find out how to apply for a job if you have gaps in your paid work.
- Guide Skills employers are looking for Ngā pūkenga e kimihia ana e ngā kaitukumahi Employability skills are your abilities, qualities and attitudes that are valued by employers. They are transferrable skills you develop through work experience, study or daily life.

## Skills employers are looking for

## Ngā pūkenga e kimihia ana e ngā kaitukumahi
Employability skills are your abilities, qualities and attitudes that are valued by employers. They are transferrable skills you develop through work experience, study or daily life.
- Guide How internships work He pēhea ngā tauiratanga e mahi ana Internships are a great way to get work experience and gain new skills. We have tips for finding an internship and getting the most out of your experience.

## How internships work

## He pēhea ngā tauiratanga e mahi ana
Internships are a great way to get work experience and gain new skills. We have tips for finding an internship and getting the most out of your experience.
- Guide Get ready for work while studying Ngā mahi hei mahi i a koe e ako ana There are things you can do while you’re studying or training to improve your chances of finding mahi when you’re ready.

## Get ready for work while studying

## Ngā mahi hei mahi i a koe e ako ana
There are things you can do while you’re studying or training to improve your chances of finding mahi when you’re ready.
- Guide About apprenticeships Mō ngā piatanga Becoming an apprentice sets you up to go further in your career as a qualified trade professional.

## About apprenticeships
Becoming an apprentice sets you up to go further in your career as a qualified trade professional.
